zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Botreaux於1245年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾時，他的父親Reginald de Botreaux28歲，母親Margaret De Whitmore24歲。他於大約1274年與Alice在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾勞斯頓享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Botreaux于1245年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾时，他的父亲Reginald de Botreaux28岁，母亲Margaret De Whitmore24岁。他于大约1274年与Alice在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年在英国英格兰可瓦爾勞斯頓享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Botreaux was born in 1245, in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reginald de Botreaux, was 28 and his mother, Margaret De Whitmore, was 24. He married Alice about 1274, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1302, in Launceston, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Botreaux est né en 1245, à Boscastle, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald de Botreaux, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Whitmore, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Alice environ 1274, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1302, à Launceston, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Botreaux 1245 in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald de Botreaux 28 und seine Mutter Margaret De Whitmore 24. Er hat um 1274 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Alice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1302 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Launceston, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Botreaux è nato il nel 1245 nel Boscastle, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Reginald de Botreaux, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret De Whitmore, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Alice circa 1274, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1302, nel Launceston, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Botreauxが1245年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルボスカストルで生まれた時，父Reginald de Botreauxは28歳，母Margaret De Whitmoreは24歳であった。約1274年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでAliceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルラウンセストンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Botreaux(이)가 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 보스카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald de Botreaux(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret De Whitmore(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 로스스턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Botreaux nasceu em 1245, em Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald de Botreaux, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Whitmore, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice aproximadamente 1274, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1302, em Launceston, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Botreaux родился в 1245 г. в местности боскастл, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reginald de Botreaux было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Whitmore, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice около 1274 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1302 г. в местности лаунсестон, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Botreaux nació en 1245, en Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald de Botreaux, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret De Whitmore, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alice aproximadamente 1274, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1302, en Launceston, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
